MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk F. Green/ N. Bautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Paul Singer, Esq. for Caritas Management Corporation, represented by Fred Doughty.
Amy Oragain, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant Miriam Johnson.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of Nov. 30, 2009 is vacated.
